title: Section 6 director disqualifications by insolvency procedure, 2022/23 to 2024/25
body: "The linked document contains the numbers of disqualifications in Great Britian under Section 6 of the Company Directors Disqualification Act, relating to unfit conduct in relation to a dissolved or insolvent company, broken down by insolvency procedure and financial year from 2022/23 to 2024/25. "
